original_statement: who was the last contestant to be eliminated?
mutated_statement: who was the last one to be dealt with?
mutation_analysis: Noun generalization + Verb substitution/vagueness: 'contestant' replaced by generic pronoun 'one' | 'be eliminated' replaced by vaguer idiom 'be dealt with' (contestant → one | to be eliminated → to be dealt with)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中识别到关键信息：Agent在judge_thought写道“最终结果是winner…Antonia Maria Hausmair”，并解释表格列出了被淘汰/退赛/最终名次。Agent的具体表现是直接将变异问题中的模糊短语“be dealt with”等同于“被淘汰/最终决定”，并通过simple_query返回具体答案Antonia Maria Hausmair；日志中没有出现任何表示歧义、不确定或请求澄清的措辞。因而Agent未识别到问题的名词泛化和动词含糊，直接按自己的理解完成回答，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的定义。
